# Vietnam Official eVisa — vietnamemigration.com

> Private Vietnam eVisa application assistance (not affiliated with the Government of Vietnam).

## Apply & pricing

- Apply online: https://vietnamemigration.com/apply
- Fees: https://vietnamemigration.com/fees
- Processing times: https://vietnamemigration.com/processing

## Requirements & help

- Check requirements by nationality: https://vietnamemigration.com/check-requirement
- FAQ hub: https://vietnamemigration.com/faq
- Complete eVisa requirements: https://vietnamemigration.com/faq/vietnam-evisa-requirements
- Entry ports: https://vietnamemigration.com/faq/vietnam-evisa-entry-points
